items.title: OpenAI backs an Illinois bill shielding AI labs from liability even for "critical harms," like 100+ deaths or $1B+ damage, if safety reports were published (Maxwell Zeff/Wired)
items.title_original: OpenAI backs an Illinois bill shielding AI labs from liability even for "critical harms," like 100+ deaths or $1B+ damage, if safety reports were published (Maxwell Zeff/Wired)
items.title_en: OpenAI backs an Illinois bill shielding AI labs from liability even for "critical harms," like 100+ deaths or $1B+ damage, if safety reports were published (Maxwell Zeff/Wired)
items.title_zh: OpenAI 支持伊利诺伊州的一项法案，如果发布安全报告，即使是“严重伤害”，例如 100 人以上死亡或 10 亿美元以上损失，人工智能实验室也无需承担责任（Maxwell Zeff/Wired）
items.title_bilingual: OpenAI 支持伊利诺伊州的一项法案，如果发布安全报告，即使是“严重伤害”，例如 100 人以上死亡或 10 亿美元以上损失，人工智能实验室也无需承担责任（Maxwell Zeff/Wired） / OpenAI backs an Illinois bill shielding AI labs from liability even for "critical harms," like 100+ deaths or $1B+ damage, if safety reports were published (Maxwell Zeff/Wired)

items.title: A survey of 1,500 people aged 14 to 29: hopefulness regarding AI has dropped from 27% to 18% over the past year, and 50% report using GenAI daily or weekly (Callie Holtermann/New York Times)

items.title_bilingual: 对 1,500 名 14 至 29 岁人群的调查显示：过去一年中，对 AI 的希望从 27% 下降到 18%，50% 的人表示每天或每周使用 GenAI（Callie Holtermann/纽约时报） / A survey of 1,500 people aged 14 to 29: hopefulness regarding AI has dropped from 27% to 18% over the past year, and 50% report using GenAI daily or weekly (Callie Holtermann/New York Times)
